1→"""Bundled skill capabilities — cached factory. 2→ 3→All simple skill capabilities (those that only need a name and description) 4→are registered here. The dict is created lazily via a cached function to 5→avoid module-import-time allocation. 6→ 7→Skills with custom install/uninstall logic (like learned-docs) are NOT here; 8→they have their own capability classes. 9→""" 10→ 11→from functools import cache 12→ 13→from erk.core.capabilities.codex_portable import codex_portable_skills 14→from erk.core.capabilities.skill_capability import SkillCapability 15→from erk_shared.context.types import AgentBackend 16→ 17→ 18→@cache 19→def bundled_skills() -> dict[str, str]: 20→ """Return the bundled skills dict. Cached to avoid re-creation.""" 21→ return { 22→ "cli-push-down": "CLI push-down pattern for moving mechanical computation to tested exec commands", 23→ "dignified-python": "Python coding standards (LBYL, modern types, ABCs)", 24→ "fake-driven-testing": "5-layer test architecture with fakes", 25→ "erk-diff-analysis": "Code diff analysis for commit messages", 26→ "erk-exec": "Erk exec subcommand reference", 27→ "erk-planning": "Plan management", 28→ "objective": "Objective tracking and management", 29→ "gh": "GitHub CLI integration", 30→ "gt": "Graphite stacked PR management",

session.assistant:
Plan execution complete. Here's a summary of what was done:
**Files created/modified:**
| File | Action | |------|--------| | `.claude/skills/cli-push-down/SKILL.md` | Created (150 lines) | | `docs/developer/agentic-engineering-patterns/README.md` | Added entry #2 for CLI Push Down | | `src/erk/capabilities/skills/bundled.py` | Registered skill in bundled capabilities | | `src/erk/core/capabilities/codex_portable.py` | Registered as codex-portable skill | | `pyproject.toml` | Added force-include for wheel distribution |
**Skill structure:** Self-contained SKILL.md with frontmatter, pattern overview, decision table, opportunity recognition checklist, step-by-step push-down procedure, 4 real case studies from commits (`4bf1b6dcb`, `28cb8cc2f`, `4c5e7ef92`, `b94b466e9`), anti-patterns section (including the over-pushing lesson from `e2bd53d05`), and related resources.
**PR:** https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/8548
